metadata.description: Opinionated agentic project management built on Linear. For solo devs and small teams with too many repos.

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: Linear issue tracking workflow via linctl. Catches intent from conversation and files issues — no forms, no ceremony. Works with any Linear workspace.

plugins.name: gsd-tools
plugins.description: Migration tools for transitioning from GSD (.planning/) to Linear. One-time use per repo — reads existing phases and creates Linear issues for incomplete work.

plugins.name: farm-stand
plugins.description: Building-in-public updates from recent Linear activity and freeform notes. Summarize what you shipped into a casual, human post.

plugins.name: idea-girlie
plugins.description: Divergent research on demand. Takes any idea, braindump, or PRD and spins up parallel agents across a wildness spectrum — from grounded prior-art research to fully unhinged vision quests. Then synthesizes everything. Use /recall to search past sessions across all repos.
